title: Chinese-Style Crispy Lamb Kebabs
description: Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside, these lamb kebabs are marinated in a mix of Chinese-inspired spices and flavors.

ingredients.name: Lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes
ingredients.notes: Look for lamb shoulder with good marbling for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Greek yogurt
ingredients.notes: Choose a plain, unflavored yogurt for the marinade

ingredients.name: Crispy rice flour
ingredients.notes: This adds a crunchy texture to the kebabs

ingredients.name: Deliciously spicy five-spice powder
ingredients.notes: Mix of cinnamon, cloves, fennel seeds, star anise, and Szechuan peppers

ingredients.name: Sesame oil
ingredients.notes: For brushing the kebabs during cooking

instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine lamb cubes, yogurt, crispy rice flour, five-spice powder, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Mix well to coat the lamb evenly.
2. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
4. Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Brush the grill or grill pan with sesame oil to prevent sticking.
6. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
7. Garnish with cilantro leaves and green onions. Serve immediately.
